Name: Macro Physical Defense
Description: Resilient infrastructure, decentralized connectivity, independent energy, multi-planetary civilization. Technologies that help people survive and live comfortable lives independently or semi-independently of long international supply chains.
Key Technologies: Starlink, Home Solar, Resilient Infrastructure, Space Technology
Vitalik Quote: Building tools to help people survive and even live comfortable lives independently or semi-independently of long international supply chains seems like a valuable defensive technology.

Name: Micro Physical Defense (Bio)
Description: Far-UVC irradiation, air filtering, rapid vaccine platforms, wastewater surveillance, decentralized health infrastructure. Creating public health infrastructure woven into the fabric of civilization without requiring social compulsion.
Key Technologies: Far-UVC, Air Filtering, Open Source Vaccines, Epidemic Detection, Wastewater Surveillance
Vitalik Quote: A future that doesn't have to resort to the sledgehammer of social compulsion because the infrastructure of public health is woven into the fabric of civilization.

Name: Cyber Defense
Description: Blockchains, zero-knowledge proofs, cryptocurrencies, social recovery wallets, trusted hardware chips, hardened operating systems. Economic and social structures with a shared hard drive without centralized dependency.
Key Technologies: ZK Proofs, Blockchains, Cryptography, Account Abstraction, Social Recovery, Trusted Hardware
Vitalik Quote: Blockchains let us create economic and social structures with a 'shared hard drive' without having to depend on centralized actors.

Name: Info Defense
Description: Community Notes-style crowdsourced fact-checking, prediction markets, consensus-finding algorithms (Pol.is), wallet-level scam detection, ZK-based identity systems. Avoiding pre-assumed authorities that know what is true and false.
Key Technologies: Community Notes, Prediction Markets, Pol.is, Sybil Resistance, Scam Detection
Vitalik Quote: The key criterion: avoiding pre-assumed authorities that 'know what is true and false' and enforce perspectives on everyone.
